meta.siteDescription: Giant Storage Integrated Solutions — industrial plastic pallets, crates, and high-density storage systems engineered for warehousing, cold chain, and logistics at scale.

home.title: Giant Storage | Integrated Industrial Solutions
home.description: Leading Egyptian industrial plastic solutions — precision-engineered pallets, crates, and storage assets for global logistics, exported from Cairo to 22+ markets.

products.title: Industrial Storage Products
products.description: Browse Giant Storage's catalog of industrial pallets, heavy-duty crates, storage bins, and containers — engineered HDPE solutions for high-density logistics.

industries.title: Industries & Manufacturing
industries.description: Giant Storage manufacturing capabilities: injection molding lines, industrial automation, and certified quality control serving diverse global sectors.

blog.title: Industrial Insights
blog.description: Articles and insights from Giant Storage on high-density storage, sustainability, and global supply chains.

gallery.title: Gallery
gallery.description: Inside Giant Storage — manufacturing facilities, production lines, warehouses, product photography, and completed client projects across 22+ markets.

about.title: About Us
about.description: Meet Giant Storage Integrated Solutions — 20+ years of excellence manufacturing industrial plastic storage solutions in Egypt.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.description: Reach the Giant Storage team — sales inquiries, technical support, and distribution partnerships. Offices in Nasr City, Cairo.

quote.title: Request a Quote
quote.description: Custom industrial quote request for high-scale storage solutions from Giant Storage.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: How Giant Storage Integrated Solutions collects, uses, and protects your information.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.description: Terms governing the use of the Giant Storage Integrated Solutions website and services.

footer.blurb: Innovative plastic solutions for the world's most demanding logistics challenges. Precision engineered in Egypt.
footer.address: 22 El Tayaran St., Nasr City, Cairo, Egypt

productsUi.heroDescription: Premium storage systems designed for high-density environments. Our heavy-duty pallets, crates, and bins are engineered for maximum durability and logistical efficiency.

galleryUi.heroDescription: A look inside our manufacturing facilities, production lines, and warehouses — and the products and completed projects we deliver to clients in 22+ markets.
galleryUi.imagesDescription: From the molding floor to the loading bay — a visual record of how Giant Storage builds, tests, and ships industrial plastic solutions.
